body: ECHO * flet 基于 Flutter 的WebUI框架 *
@REM * 必备 - https://github.com/flet-dev/flet/releases [最新版] 或 https://sourceforge.net/projects/flet.mirror/files/ [最新版]
@REM * 手动下载 flet-windows.zip 解压后放在 %USERPROFILE%\.flet\client\flet-desktop-full-[版本号]\flet\flet.exe [注意目录结构]
@REM ECHO - Creating a new Flet app

ECHO set "SYSTEM_PATH=C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Intel\Shared Libraries\bin32;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Intel\Shared Libraries\bin;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\">>"%~dp0_felt_run.cmd"
ECHO @REM * 添加临时系统环境变量>>"%~dp0_felt_run.cmd"
ECHO 智能主题模式检测库
description: flet 基于 Flutter 的WebUI框架
